name: ETH Trend Reset Continuation v1
edge_mechanism: deeper pullback reset into value followed by reclaim and modest continuation
thesis: ETH 4h is the cleaner similar-asset lane for testing whether a deeper reset continuation can still work inside a mixed chop/trend-up structure without relying on shallow EMA touches. The edge should come from repaired pullbacks that regain directional control and travel enough for a modest second leg.
invalidation_condition: Abort if reset-and-reclaim setups are too sparse, if reclaimed pullbacks fail to travel after costs, or if the market behaves as pure range rotation with no second leg.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Price pulls back materially inside a broader structure, reclaims fast value, and resumes for a short continuation burst before the next rotation phase.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Even in mixed chop/transition regimes, repaired pullbacks can create repeatable continuation bursts. ETH is the clean control lane for that mechanism.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h offers readable repaired-pullback structure with lower noise than TAO or AXS.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If the broader tape is too rotational, reclaimed pullbacks will look valid but fail to extend beyond costs.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries are correct but travel is short, compress exits or add faster time-based de-risking before changing setup structure.
pre_submit_reasoning.expected_outcome_pattern: Selective repaired-pullback entries with first-target capture doing most of the expectancy and only occasional runner contribution.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_success: ETH 4h plus at least one cross-lane show real post-cost continuation after reclaim with acceptable density.
pre_submit_reasoning.what_would_count_as_failure: 0 trades, too-sparse output, or reclaimed pullbacks that repeatedly stall immediately.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; pullback, reclaim, and participation check align
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed by moderate reset depth rather than rare washout definitions

test_lanes.why_included: Clean control lane for repaired-pullback continuation in the current basket.
test_lanes.continue_if: Reset-reclaim trades show credible density and positive post-cost continuation.
test_lanes.rotate_away_if: The lane stays too rotational and reclaimed pullbacks never extend.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: A decent number of repaired pullbacks followed by modest second legs.

test_lanes.why_included: Checks whether the mechanism transfers to the basket primary lane.
test_lanes.continue_if: TAO shows comparable repaired continuation with acceptable density.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Noisier but still tradable repaired continuation moves.

test_lanes.why_included: Tests whether the same grammar survives a more fragile high-beta lane.
test_lanes.continue_if: AXS preserves the repaired continuation shape without becoming chaos.
test_lanes.expected_if_right: Fewer entries but punchier post-reclaim legs than ETH.

long: Time-based de-risk after 2 bars if unrealized gain < 0.12 * ATR_14 by selling 15%
short: Time-based de-risk after 2 bars if unrealized gain < 0.12 * ATR_14 by covering 15%
